summary: Comprehensive testing of kennel operations platform completed. Backend APIs 96.6% successful (28/29 tests), frontend fully functional with all role-based dashboards working correctly. Fixed staff clock-in issue during testing.

resolved_bugs.issue: TimeEntry model missing clock_in field during creation
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Added clock_in=datetime.now(timezone.utc) parameter to TimeEntry creation

minor_issues.issue: Logout redirect occasionally times out but functionality works

passed_tests: Role-based access control and dashboard redirection
Customer dashboard with stats, dogs, bookings sections
Staff dashboard with clock in/out, tasks, action cards
Admin dashboard with comprehensive stats and navigation
Booking system with automatic price calculation
Daily updates with AI summary generation (GPT-5.2)
